title: A Home with Old Hollywood Glamour for Sale in the Hollywood Hills
description: Silent film stars Rudolph Valentino and Pola Negri reportedly rendezvoused here in the 1920s.
author: Linda Laban

title: Your Next House May Be a Birdhouse
description: Market data suggests a soaring future for bird watching and for sales of feeding products.
author: Anna Staropoli

title: Homes for Sale in Manhattan and Brooklyn
description: This week’s properties are in Hamilton Heights, Murray Hill and Downtown Brooklyn.
author: Heather Senison

title: Homes for Sale in New York and New Jersey
description: This week’s properties are three-bedroom homes in Freeport, N.Y., and Roseland, N.J.
author: Claudia Gryvatz Copquin and Jill P. Capuzzo

title: You Love Your Native Garden. But Will Buyers Love It Too?
description: For homeowners who have ‘rewilded’ their gardens into mini nature preserves, a moment of truth arrives when they prepare to sell.
author: Jessie Graham

title: $525,000 Homes in California, Indiana and Florida
description: A pair of Spanish-style bungalows in Twentynine Palms, Calif., a farmhouse in Whitestown, Ind., and a Craftsman in Tampa, Fla.
author: Angela Serratore

title: The Feud Inside England’s Community of Master Home Thatchers
description: Inside the tiny community of English master thatchers, a fight is unfolding over a tradition that may not survive.
author: Rukmini Callimachi and Jeremie Souteyrat

title: A Paris Pied-à-Terre, Designed for a Daughter
description: A designer’s elegant apartment renovation in Saint-Germain-des-Prés.
author: Julie Lasky

title: A Gabled Penthouse Atop the Dakota Is on the Market for $8 Million
description: The Upper West Side duplex was the longtime home of the art experts Stephen and Polly Rubin and is being sold by their estate.
author: Vivian Marino

title: A Gardening Guide to Large-Leaf Plants
description: Managing the scale of your foliage can give your landscapes surprising ways to catch the eye.
author: Margaret Roach

title: Giving Up a Bungalow in Seattle for a Home With a Shared Language
description: After a decades-long discussion, a couple whose careers unfolded at the same architectural firm wanted to create a home of their own.
author: Tim McKeough

title: $750,000 Homes in Michigan, New Hampshire and Texas
description: An Arts & Crafts house in Detroit, a farmhouse in Sandwich and a midcentury modern in Campbell.
author: Angela Serratore
